'''R5-M1''' was a slow-moving and noisy [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] that was employed by [[Fiz Cor'gril]] as a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]]. The unit had the annoying habit of beeping and chirping to itself, while its malfunctioning acoustic signaler sometimes raised the sound level to unbearable levels.
[[Garginoolaara]], a [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]], worked with the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] to keep its personality from going foul, however he was unable to repair some of the droid's other problems.<ref name="AJ9" />
